title: Admin UI System Status stuck in loading state, database collections not loading
description: System Status pane shows loading state indefinitely. Refresh Status button non-functional. Database Management collections button does not populate collections. Previously showed Vector/Graph/Dictionary status.
closed_reason: Fixed JavaScript DOM timing issue - wrapped initialization functions (refreshStatus, refreshBugs) in DOMContentLoaded event listener to ensure DOM elements exist before functions execute. Admin UI status loading and refresh functionality now works properly.
